title: Bulk import employees
description: Download the template, fill in your data, then upload to validate before importing.

template.title: Step 1 — Download template
template.hint: Use the official template so columns and formats match the system.
template.downloadError: Could not download the template, please try again.

upload.title: Step 2 — Upload file
upload.autoCreateHint: If off, rows referencing a non-existent department/position will leave that link empty.

review.title: Step 3 — Validation results
review.noValidRows: No valid rows to import. Fix the file and try again.
review.willImport: Will import {{count}} valid row(s). Rows with errors will be skipped.

progress.title: Importing data
progress.hint: You can close this window; the import keeps running in the background.

done.title: Import complete
done.successHint: New employees were created as "Invited" and will receive an email to set their password.
done.withErrors: Some rows were not imported. Download the error report for details.
done.failedHint: The import could not be completed. Please try again.

errors.fileRequired: Please choose a file before validating.
errors.validateFailed: File validation failed, please try again.
errors.startFailed: Could not start the import, please try again.
